name: Archive Collected Data for Exfiltration
description: Detects creation of archives in staging directories with sensitive file patterns
query:
// Detect archiving of collected data
// Trigger on zip, rar, tar, or 7z creating archives with passwords or in temp dirs
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(zip|rar|7z|tar)\s+.*(\-p|-password|\\temp\\|/tmp/)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 120 seconds
